title: adenosma fragrans
intro: Adenosma fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Adenosma, is a plant species within the family Orobanchaceae, characterized by its small, white flowers and fragrant scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Adenosma fragrans include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Adenosma fragrans can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
